_comment: AnyCompany Ideal Customer Profile — loaded by analysis_agent at runtime. Edit this file to update ICP criteria without changing agent code. Keep high_fit/low_fit item text concise (displayed verbatim in the system prompt). score_bonus and score_penalty are integer adjustments to the 0-100 prospect score.
high_fit: Active open-source presence with growing community
Recently launched or in growth phase
B2B focus with technical buyer persona
low_fit: Consumer-only product with no developer angle
